title: Reis Birth
wikitext:
[]: Rei's Birth             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 18, 2007 4:41 pm The more I was thinking about this the more I realized that one of the aspects of NGE I'm fuzziest on is that concerning the details behind Rei's birth. I'm quite sure there are dozens of topics on this, but YOU try typing "Rei" into the search engine. :evil: What I (think I) know: -Rei was born out of the attempted salvage of Yui from Sho. -Rei contains Yui's body (because of the LCL inside Sho?), but Lilith's soul. Now, the details I don't know: -Why can't Rei's ATF hold its shape (as we see her falling apart in EoE)? -Why/How were they able to "copy" Rei? -How did they form the whole Dummy Plug System from her? If anyone wants to post some relevent threads and lock this one, that would be okay. Or, just as preferably, answer these questions here...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Jun 18, 2007 5:07 pm I, well, ASSUMED that she was cloned from "recoverd DNA" which was then modified...NOT that she "congealed out of LCL" like Shinji in episode 20.

[]: Re: Rei's Birth             Quote Post by Hailtheplatypus » Mon Jun 18, 2007 5:23 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: -Why can't Rei's ATF hold its shape (as we see her falling apart in EoE)?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 18, 2007 5:38 pm V wrote: I, well, ASSUMED that she was cloned from "recoverd DNA" which was then modified...NOT that she "congealed out of LCL" like Shinji in episode 20.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Jun 18, 2007 5:51 pm Here's a much older and more complicated discussion, featuring the one and only Zugzwang. :) [url]http://www.animeboards.com/showthread.php?t=59298[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jun 18, 2007 11:44 pm The RCB says Rei was created from Yui's salvaged remains, whatever the hell that means. I would assume Rei was indeed "born" during the failed salvage attempt and Lilith's soul was sucked into an empty vessel much the same as Yui and Kyoko with the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jun 18, 2007 11:51 pm She was falling appart because ritsuko was locked up and she maintained her

[]: Re: Rei's Birth             Quote Post by Jay911 » Tue Jun 19, 2007 12:01 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: -Why can't Rei's ATF hold its shape (as we see her falling apart in EoE)?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Jun 19, 2007 8:45 am It's interesting how all the Rei dummies where in a big tank of LCL too. To me it seems to imply that there's something... WRONG with Rei's body to the effect that it can't hold its shape without frequent LCL dips (apparantly an ATF isn't enough). I'm just wondering what the logic behind this is.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 19, 2007 1:48 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: It's interesting how all the Rei dummies where in a big tank of LCL too. To me it seems to imply that there's something... WRONG with Rei's body to the effect that it can't hold its shape without frequent LCL dips (apparantly an ATF isn't enough). I'm just wondering what the logic behind this is.

[]:             Quote Post by Jumpstart A. Cat » Tue Jun 19, 2007 2:19 pm Ornette wrote: I don't think it was just the LCL that was keeping the clones intact in the tank. When Ritsuko destroyed the clones the datapad said "Destrudo Release". If LCL had the inherent property of holding sacks of flesh in its shape, it doesn't have a very good track record.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 19, 2007 2:46 pm In the other uses of "Destrudo" (BB's EoE translation has it written as "Destrado") in ep 20, 21, and EoE, it is something that broke the "ego barrier" which then caused the person to turn into LCL, and no indication that it originated from a soul (although this is probably a matter of ambiguity). Now I realize this is a little different in the Reiquarium case, these clones have no soul, and thus no ATF. Therefore, why would you need to introduce something to break down an ego barrier that doesn't exist? The 3 other times that we see (well, one is implied) someone losing an ego barrier also occurs inside LCL, but the LCL itself didn't seem to do anything in preventing it from happening, and in ep20, it only prevented one from forming. I'm sure there's more going on with the Rei clones as well as with LCL itself, as it's often used as some all-purpose liquid. But it doesn't make sense to me that LCL, by itself, which is also what everyone is made up of, also prevents sacks of flesh (which presumably are also made of LCL) from losing its shape.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jun 19, 2007 4:22 pm Ornette wrote: (which presumably are also made of LCL)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 19, 2007 7:04 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Ornette wrote: (which presumably are also made of LCL)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Jun 19, 2007 7:51 pm I think Rei was just made from recovered Yui DNA (she didn't come from the LCL in the entry plug like Shinji did in episode 20) As for "how did she get Lilith's soul"? ...I didn't think that came from the Contact Experiment. I thought they "put in" Lilith's soul LATER, using "Metaphysical biology"

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Jun 19, 2007 8:08 pm V wrote: I think Rei was just made from recovered Yui DNA (she didn't come from the LCL in the entry plug like Shinji did in episode 20)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Jun 19, 2007 8:13 pm well, the same way they can get Lilith's soul from the dead Rei II into Rei III

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Jun 19, 2007 8:20 pm V wrote: well, the same way they can get Lilith's soul from the dead Rei II into Rei III

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Tue Jun 19, 2007 8:28 pm A hand is clearly visible in the plug's shattered remains when Akagi and a tech look inside. I always took "Clean out the plug and destroy everything" to mean put the bits of Rei II into a Glad garbage bag so we can try to retrieve her soul, and make sure nothing remains of what we've done here.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Jun 19, 2007 8:34 pm Jay911 wrote: A hand is clearly visible in the plug's shattered remains when Akagi and a tech look inside. I always took "Clean out the plug and destroy everything" to mean put the bits of Rei II into a Glad garbage bag so we can try to retrieve her soul, and make sure nothing remains of what we've done here.
